macro_events.event_summary: A shooting incident occurred at the White House Correspondents' Dinner, with President Trump set to address the nation afterward.
primary_drivers: Risk-off sentiment / safe-haven flows on political violence headline
Potential renewed gun control vs. gun rights political debate driving firearms demand expectations

beneficiaries.rationale: Sturm Ruger is a pure-play US firearms manufacturer; high-profile shooting events historically drive a short-term spike in firearm sales on fears of tightened gun legislation (the 'Trump slump' reverses when gun-control rhetoric returns).
Smith & Wesson Brands — same mechanism as RGR; firearms manufacturer that sees demand pull-forward when gun-control legislation fears rise after high-profile shooting incidents.
Axon Enterprise (Tasers, body cameras, security tech) — direct beneficiary of heightened security spending narrative following an attack at a high-profile political event.

headlines: Watch: Trump set to speak after shooting at White House Correspondents' Dinner
